concepts.title: Functional equations
concepts.conceptBody:
Function as Series

In this type, the function is given in the form of a series i.e. it is dependent on the values

previous to it. Or some such relation is given to you.

Let us solve some questions to understand the concept.

Q) Let $f$  be a function satisfying $f\left( x+y \right)=f\left( x \right)+f\left( y \right)$ for all $x,y\in R$. If 

$f\left( 1 \right)=k$ then find $f\left( n \right)$. 

Solution : 

We are given the value of \(f(1)\,=\text{ i}\text{.e}\text{. }\text{ f}\left( 1 \right)=\text{k}\)

$\And $ $f(x+y)\,=\text{f}\left( \text{x} \right)+\text{f}\left( \text{y} \right)$

$\And $ we have to find $f\left( n \right)$

putting

$\begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{x} & =1 ~\And~\text{ y}=1\text{ in }\left( \text{i} \right) \\ \text{f}\left( 2 \right)=\text{f}\left( 1 \right)+\text{f}\left( 1 \right) & =2\text{f}\left( 1 \right)=2\text{k} \\ \text{f}\left( 3 \right)=\text{f}\left( 2 \right)+\text{f}\left( 1 \right) & =2\text{k}+\text{k}=3\text{k} \\ \text{f}\left( 4 \right)=\text{f}\left( 3 \right)+\text{f}\left( 1 \right) & =3\text{k}+\text{k}=4\text{k} \\ \text{f}\left( \text{n} \right)=\text{f}\left( \text{n}-1 \right)+\text{f}\left( 1 \right) & =\left( \text{n}-1 \right)\text{k}+\text{k}=\text{nk} \\ \text{f}\left( \text{n} \right) & =\text{nk} \\ \end{array}$

Tricky one

Q) If $af\left( x+1 \right)+bf\left( \frac{1}{x+1} \right)=x,x\ne -1,a\ne b$ then find the value of $f\left( 2 \right)$. 

Solution : 

Given $\text{af}\left( \text{x}+1 \right)+\text{bf}\left( \frac{1}{\text{x}+1} \right)=\text{x}$

rewriting it

$\text{af}\left( \text{x}+1 \right)+\text{b}\left( \frac{1}{\text{x}+1} \right)=\left( \text{x}+1 \right)-1$

replacing $\left( x+1 \right)$ by $\frac{1}{x+1}$

$\Rightarrow \text{ af }\left( \frac{1}{x+1} \right)+bf\left( x+1 \right)=\left( \frac{1}{x+1} \right)-1$

now doing a (i) - b (ii), we get

$\left( {{a}^{2}}-{{b}^{2}} \right)f\left( x+1 \right)=a\left( x+1 \right)-\left( \frac{b}{x+1} \right)+\left( b-a \right)$

Putting $x=1\text{ to }\text{ get }f\left( 2 \right)$

$\begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \left( {{a}^{2}}-{{b}^{2}} \right)f\left( 2 \right) & =2a-\frac{b}{2}+\left( b-a \right) \\ {} & =a+\frac{b}{2} \\ \Rightarrow f\left( 2 \right) & =\frac{2a+b}{2\left( {{a}^{2}}-{{b}^{2}} \right)} \\ \end{array}$
